alkylation reagent: iodoacetamide (100 mM IAA in UA buffer)
alkylation concentration: iodoacetamide (100 mM IAA in UA buffer)
cleavage agent: trypsin as the enzyme used to generate peptides
fractionation method: fractionated by RP chromatography using the Agilent 1260 infinity II HPLC.
fragmentation method: MS2 scans were acquired at a resolution of 15000 for HCD spectra at m/z 200.
instrument: conducted on a Q Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer
ionization type: The mass spectrometer was operated in positive ion mode.
labeling: labeled using Tandem Mass TagsTM (TMT) reagent
